infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Dealspot needs your location to find deals nearby when Deal Mode is active.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Dealspot needs your location to find deals nearby.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Dealspot needs background location access to alert you to deals nearby while Deal Mode is on.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Dealspot uses the camera to scan QR codes when redeeming deals.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Dealspot needs your location to find deals nearby when Deal Mode is active.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Dealspot needs background location to alert you to deals.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Dealspot needs your location to find deals nearby.

plugins.cameraPermission: Dealspot uses the camera to scan QR codes.
